name: NodeGoat A2 — passwords stored and compared in plaintext (no hashing)

provenance.note: Both sides verbatim-real: NodeGoat master stores raw 'password' in addUser and compares 'fromDB === fromUser' in validateLogin live, with bcrypt-nodejs imported but unused; the documented 'Fix for A2' bcrypt.hashSync(store) and bcrypt.compareSync(login) forms ship as adjacent commented blocks. Diff inverts the documented fix.

notes: Coverage gap closed by new rule B-21 (absent hashing, CWE-256); B-07 (weak hash) accepted as alternative. NodeGoat A2 Broken Authentication.
